calibration_notes: My recent intraday BEARISH calls on SPY/QQQ have been directionally correct but targets too aggressive - actual moves averaging -0.10% vs -0.20% predicted. TSLA and IWM have been my weakest reads, going opposite direction on BEARISH calls. Adjusting: tightening intraday ranges to 0.5% max and increasing confidence floor to 50% when oil >$100 creates clear macro headwind.
